post.summary: Reverses goods receipt for customer returns delivery.
post.description: Reverses the goods receipt for the customer returns delivery.

post.summary: Posts goods receipt for customer returns delivery.
post.description: Posts goods receipt for the customer returns delivery.

post.summary: Confirms putaway quantity of customer returns delivery items.
post.description: Confirms the putaway quantity of all customer returns delivery items.

post.summary: Confirms putaway quantity of customer returns delivery item.
post.description: Confirms the putaway quantity of the specified customer returns delivery item.

post.summary: Takes over delivery quantity as putaway quantity for all customer returns delivery items.
post.description: Takes over the delivery quantity as the putaway quantity for all items of the customer returns delivery.

post.summary: Takes over delivery quantity as putaway quantity for specified customer returns delivery item.
post.description: Takes over the delivery quantity as the putaway quantity for the specified customer returns delivery item.

post.summary: Creates an additional batch split item for an customer returns delivery item.
post.description: Creates an additional batch split item for the specified customer returns delivery item and optionally sets the delivery quantity and batch-related fields.

post.summary: Sets putaway quantity in base unit of measure for delivery item.
post.description: Sets the putaway quantity in base unit of measure of the specified delivery item.

post.summary: Sets putaway quantity and delivery quantity for customer returns delivery item.
post.description: Sets the same value for putaway quantity and delivery quantity in base unit of measure for the specified customer returns delivery item.

post.summary: Sets putaway quantity and delivery quantity for customer returns delivery item.
post.description: Sets the same value for putaway quantity and delivery quantity in sales unit of measure for the specified customer returns delivery item.
